final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: cinematic concept art, wide landscape
Primary request: cyberpunk futuristic cityscape at night with neon-lit skyscrapers, flying vehicles, acid rain, and reflective wet streets
Scene/backdrop: dense megacity skyline with towering brutalist and glass skyscrapers, hovering vehicles between buildings, rain-soaked streets with puddles reflecting neon signs
Subject: futuristic urban environment with layered architecture, holographic billboards, flying cars with light trails, rain droplets visible in air
Style/medium: cinematic digital art, Blade Runner aesthetic, photorealistic rendering
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, low horizon line emphasizing towering buildings, atmospheric depth with foreground puddles and mid-ground traffic
Lighting/mood: dramatic artificial lighting from neon signs and windows, volumetric fog and rain haze, moody and dystopian atmosphere
Color palette: dominant deep blues and purples with magenta and cyan neon accents, warm orange highlights from vehicle lights, wet asphalt grays
Materials/textures: glossy wet concrete and metal surfaces, glass reflections, rain-slicked streets with mirror-like puddles, gritty urban decay
Constraints: preserve the acid rain effect and reflective ground surfaces as key atmospheric elements
Avoid: clean utopian look, bright daylight, cheerful mood, oversaturated colors, low-poly or game-like aesthetics
